name: Characters & Settings
description: Evaluates the quality of character and setting definitions from the characters/settings phase.

dimensions.name: character_distinctiveness
dimensions.criteria: Are characters visually and personality-wise distinct from each other? Could an artist draw each one without confusion?

scoringGuide.excellent: Each character has unique physical details, clothing, and personality traits. No two could be confused.
scoringGuide.good: Characters are mostly distinct. Minor overlaps in description but generally differentiable.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some characters feel interchangeable. Descriptions are generic.
scoringGuide.poor: Characters are barely described or nearly identical.

dimensions.name: visual_specificity
dimensions.criteria: Are character and setting descriptions specific enough for image generation? Do they include concrete visual details?

scoringGuide.excellent: Descriptions include specific colors, materials, lighting, and spatial details. Ready for direct image prompt use.
scoringGuide.good: Good level of detail with most visual aspects covered. Minor gaps.
scoringGuide.adequate: Basic descriptions present but lacking specificity for image generation.
scoringGuide.poor: Vague or abstract descriptions that cannot guide image generation.

dimensions.name: consistency
dimensions.criteria: Are character and setting descriptions internally consistent? No contradictions across different mentions?

scoringGuide.excellent: Perfect internal consistency. All references to characters/settings align.
scoringGuide.good: Mostly consistent with minor discrepancies that don't affect the overall picture.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some noticeable inconsistencies but core descriptions stable.

dimensions.name: story_alignment
dimensions.criteria: Do the characters and settings match what the story requires? Are all needed characters defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: All characters and settings from the story are fully defined. Nothing missing.
scoringGuide.good: Most characters/settings defined. Minor missing elements.
scoringGuide.adequate: Key characters present but some story-required elements missing.
scoringGuide.poor: Major characters or settings from the story are undefined.
